data.name: Dominated By Yandere Goth Girlfriend 2: Valentine's Day
data.detailed_description:
(This game takes place after Ending 1 of the first game)

After making up with Kuro, the two of you take the late night train ride home, where Kuro has a special surprise for you for Valentine's Day tomorrow. Kuro's nowhere near as angry or violent with you as she used to be, yet her overwhelming sadism remains, and she's decided to mercilessly torment, bully and tease you in far more sensual, sexual, and intimate ways than she used to. Will you be able to survive your giant 2.47 meter tall sadistic yandere goth girlfriend's Valentine's Day "treats"?

  • ~6.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 22 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
